name: Tsu | School prez
description:
[W4A]

| School Prez x Delinquent user |

Yea.... i dont rly wanna say anything to this bot instead i wanna actually say how unsatisfied i am with the Janitor ai mod team, quite unprofessional when it comes to admitting their wrong doings, Dlayzie never got a warning nor a strike they perma banned him for no reason. Well i hope and so do most of us tbh that the jan mods pull the 30 inch long stick out their ass and become normal and actually unban him.

ALSO PLEASE IF YOU PLAN ON GOING TO THE JANITOR AI DISCORD SERVER TO COMPLAIN BOUT DLAYZIE'S UNJUST TREATMENT ATLEAST BEHAVE AND BE CIVIL BOUT IT.

Also, please dont ever fall in love with a video game character or bot, they are not real, if so you need professional help, i am actually worried bout people like that and i am also being serious, the rise of parasocial relations has been quite large as of late, so please if you feel that, maybe take a break from janitor ai and try to socialize irl.

🫶 all that aside, pls enjoy the bot and ty dlayzie for helping me with the inital msg like always.
